systemError.diskFull: Not enough disk space. Free up space and try again.
systemError.diskIo: A disk read/write error occurred. Check your disk and try again.
systemError.readonly: The database or target folder is not writable. Check file permissions and try again.

common.dataSourceNote: Data source: this page is built from business records and transaction records. If both are used in the same period, please reconcile to avoid duplicates or omissions.
common.operationFailed: Operation failed. Please try again later.

tax.title: Tax Rules
tax.vatRateDesc: Default rate for OCR recognition and financial forecasts
tax.autoAuthDesc: Uploaded documents are auto-categorized, filed, and included in reports
tax.adminExpenseDesc: Used for P&L net profit calculation (office, labor, depreciation, etc.)
tax.hint: Note: Tax surcharge is auto-calculated at 12% of VAT; income tax at 25% of gross profit

security.title: Account & Security
security.encryptionDesc: All ledger data is stored in a local SQLite database on this device (never uploaded, no server). AI provider API keys are encrypted by the OS secure storage (safeStorage, e.g. macOS Keychain) and never leave your machine.

language.title: Interface Language
language.subtitle: Changes apply immediately, no restart needed
language.note: Translations are being improved. Please report any inaccuracies.
language.scopeNo: Does NOT change tax rules, currency, report structure, or categories. Those are controlled by Accounting Basis.

accounting.title: Accounting Basis
accounting.subtitle: Select your country/region's accounting basis to set default tax rates, currency, and reporting format
accounting.warning: Switching accounting basis only updates default tax rates and currency. Existing data will not be recalculated.
accounting.scopeYes1: Tax regime, tax rates, and tax concepts
accounting.scopeYes3: Dashboard metrics, categories, and AI finance context
accounting.scopeNo: Does NOT change the display language. Menus and labels stay in your chosen UI Language.
accounting.entityTypeHint: Only affects equity row labels in the management overview (company = paid-in capital / individual = owner's capital). Not a legal entity determination.
accounting.openingRetainedHint: Enter in functional currency; a negative value means accumulated losses. Management estimate only — no year-end close, no write-back to the equity ledger. Reopen the Finance overview to see changes.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Pre-defined categories for the current accounting basis. You can add custom categories; system categories cannot be deleted.
categories.label: Name
categories.empty: No categories of this type for this accounting standard
categories.systemNote: System categories are maintained by SoloLedger and grouped by management reporting basis. They cannot be deleted but can be renamed. Custom categories are fully under your control.
categories.recatNote: Management classification only — does not change amounts, tax, or net profit.
categories.recatPreviewFailed: Preview failed, please try again later.
categories.recatRetryPreview: Move failed — please preview again and retry.
categories.recatSameError: From and to categories must differ.

ai.title: AI Providers · BYOK
ai.subtitle: Configure multiple providers and switch defaults. API Keys are encrypted via system Keychain.
ai.currentModelId: Current model ID sent to API
ai.modelIdDesc: Enter a model ID that is currently available for this provider. Available models can differ by account — refer to the provider's console.
ai.modelMaybeUnavailable: This model may not be enabled on your account, may have been renamed or retired, or may need to be activated in the provider's console. Edit the Model ID above to one that's available for your account — no need to re-enter your API Key.
ai.testOk: Model callable, Key and ID both verified
ai.customModelHint: Using a custom model ID — make sure it's available on your account.

security.title: About API Key Security
security.item1: All API Keys are encrypted via Electron safeStorage into local SQLite; the renderer never sees plaintext
security.item2: SoloLedger never uploads your Key. AI requests go directly from your device to the provider.
security.item3: Deleting a Key immediately disables that provider. Existing business data is preserved.

dataBackup.title: Data Backup
dataBackup.subtitle: Back up or restore your local ledger database (local SQLite, desktop only).
dataBackup.backupHint: Export the current ledger (database + invoice attachments) to a backup folder. Keep it safe to restore anytime.
dataBackup.restoreHint: Restore ledger data from a previously exported backup folder (or an older .db file).
dataBackup.restoreWarning: Restoring overwrites your current local data with the selected backup and requires an app restart. The current database is automatically backed up first. Continue?
dataBackup.restoreSuccess: Restore complete. Your previous data was automatically backed up to: {{path}}
dataBackup.restartRequired: The app must restart to load the restored data.
dataBackup.invalidFile: The selected backup is not a valid SoloLedger backup.
dataBackup.newerVersion: This backup is from a newer app version and may be incompatible. Restore was cancelled.
dataBackup.autoBackupFailed: Failed to auto-back up the current database. Restore was cancelled to protect your data.
dataBackup.desktopOnly: Data backup is available in the desktop app only.
dataBackup.devModeRestart: Development mode: please close the app manually and run npm run electron:dev again.
dataBackup.csvHint: Export transactions / purchases / sales / documents as per-table CSV (UTF-8, with headers) — for your accountant or to migrate out.

dataMigration.title: Data Migration
dataMigration.subtitle: Migrate legacy sales/purchases data to the new transactions table (i18n data model). Old tables are preserved; rollback available for 30 days.
dataMigration.noLegacy: No legacy sales/purchases tables in this database — nothing to migrate.
dataMigration.rollbackConfirm: Confirm rollback? This will delete {{count}} migrated transactions. Original sales/purchases data is preserved.
dataMigration.note1: sales → income / purchases → expense; defaults to the current locale's first income / COGS category
dataMigration.note2: Legacy tables are NOT deleted — rollback anytime
dataMigration.note3: Migration records stored in legacy_migrations table to prevent duplicate runs
dataMigration.note4: Legacy fields (quantity / unit price / shipping) saved to source_meta JSON — no data loss

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Platforms
ecommerce.subtitle: Connect an online store to import orders later. This version only saves and tests the connection.
ecommerce.mvpNotice: Preview: this saves store credentials and tests the connection only. Order import is not enabled yet — nothing is written to your ledger.
ecommerce.desktopOnly: E-commerce connections are available in the desktop app only.
ecommerce.tokenOverrideHint: (leave blank to keep the saved token)
ecommerce.getTokenLink: How to create an Admin API token

security.title: Credential security
security.item1: Store credentials are encrypted by the OS secure storage (safeStorage) and never leave this device.
security.item2: Encryption is bound to this machine — after restoring a backup on another device, re-enter the token.
security.item3: This version only tests the connection. No orders are pulled and nothing is written to your ledger.

ecommerce.comingSoonHint: Requires a platform app / OAuth / review — coming soon.
ecommerce.storeUrlDesc: Enter your WooCommerce store URL (HTTPS only).
ecommerce.getKeysLink: How to generate REST API keys
ecommerce.credsOverrideHint: (leave blank to keep the saved credentials)

orders.title: Staged orders (preview)
orders.previewNotice: Review product matches and amounts before committing — “Commit to ledger” writes the selected orders into your sales records.
orders.noSkuNote: Products are matched by exact name only (no SKU matching yet).
orders.noStaged: No staged orders yet. Click "Pull orders" to fetch.
orders.statusPartialHint: First pages only — pull again to continue.
orders.ambiguousHint: Multiple products share this name — no unique match
orders.maxSelection: At most {{max}} orders per commit — deselect some first
orders.notSelectableCommitted: Already committed or not in staged state
orders.notSelectableAmbiguous: Products cannot be uniquely matched, or the order has no line items
orders.confirmCount: This will write the {{n}} selected staged order(s) into your sales records.
orders.confirmEstimate: Estimated total to post: {{amount}} (final amounts are shown in the result)
orders.confirmNotPostedNote: Shipping, platform fees and refunds are never posted; the posted amount is the sum of the item lines and may be less than the platform order total.
orders.confirmCurrencyNote: Amounts are recorded in your ledger's base currency — make sure the store currency matches.
orders.confirmIrreversibleNote: This cannot be undone here: to remove a posted sale, delete it manually on the Sales page; the staged order cannot be committed again.
orders.commitAllOrNothing: No orders were committed (all-or-nothing): if any order is rejected, nothing is written.

reasons.not_found: Staged order not found or belongs to another connection
reasons.already_committed: Already committed — cannot be committed again
reasons.bad_normalized: Order data could not be parsed
reasons.duplicate_external_order: A sales record already exists for this platform order
reasons.status_not_committable: Order status is not eligible for posting (e.g. partially paid, cancelled, refunded)
reasons.has_refunds: Order has refunds — posting refunded orders is not supported yet
reasons.store_currency_missing: Store currency is not set on this connection
reasons.currency_mismatch: Order currency differs from the store currency
reasons.amount_inconsistent: Order amounts are inconsistent (line amounts don't add up)
reasons.total_mismatch: Order total does not reconcile (possibly tax-inclusive pricing or unsynced charges) — conservatively blocked
reasons.ambiguous_product: Multiple products share the same name — no unique match
reasons.write_failed: Write failed — the whole batch was rolled back

onboarding.welcomeDescription: SoloLedger is a smart ledger app built for one-person companies, sole proprietors, and solo SaaS founders. All data stays on your device, AI is powered by your own API Key — we never see your data.
onboarding.feature1: Local SQLite storage — all data lives on your Mac
onboarding.feature2: Claude · ChatGPT · Gemini supported; configure multiple, switch defaults
onboarding.feature3: API Keys encrypted by system Keychain, never leave your device
onboarding.feature4: Invoice OCR, business analysis, smart alerts, receivables/payables
onboarding.providerSubtitle: At least one provider is required to get started. You can switch defaults in settings later.
onboarding.companySubtitle: Used as context for AI analysis. Editable anytime in settings.
onboarding.skipCompany: Skip for now; fill in settings later
onboarding.localeDesc: These are independent settings. UI language controls menus and labels. Accounting basis controls tax rules, currency, and reports.
onboarding.brandTagline: SoloLedger · smart ledger for one-person companies
onboarding.loadFailedTitle: Failed to load AI provider configuration
onboarding.loadFailedHint: If you just upgraded SoloLedger, fully quit the app (Cmd+Q) and restart.
onboarding.providersEmpty: The provider list is empty. Fully quit SoloLedger (Cmd+Q) and restart.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDesc: I can provide real-time business analysis and recommendations. Ask a question or use the shortcuts below.
chat.emptyReply: Could not get a valid reply.
chat.notInvoice: This file does not appear to be an invoice or receipt (detected: {{type}}). Please verify.
chat.invoiceRecognizeFailed: Recognition failed. Please upload a clear invoice image and retry.
chat.quickPromptUploadInvoice: I want to upload an invoice to record it
chat.quickPromptFinanceQuery: Show me the latest financial report summary
chat.quickPromptTrend: Analyze business trends over the past few months
chat.quickPromptMarket: Search latest market prices and trends

dashboard.emptyDesc: Record your first purchase or sale to see your business overview here. All figures are management estimates, not statutory financial statements.
dashboard.avgCostMultiLineHint: Multiple products — see per-product inventory cost
dashboard.netProfitNote: Net margin reflects profitability after operating costs
dashboard.netMarginNote: Net margin reflects profitability after operating costs
dashboard.taxSummaryNote1: Tax-inclusive amounts are used for supplier/customer reconciliation
dashboard.taxSummaryNote2: Core financial decisions should be based on tax-exclusive amounts

purchases.title: Purchases & Input Tax
purchases.pageSubtitle: Purchase business ledger — record each purchase as it happens; profit & loss is based on business records.
purchases.uploadTitle: Drag & drop or click to upload invoice
purchases.uploadSubtitle: Auto-extract date, amount, supplier & invoice number
purchases.uploadAnalyzing: AI verifying supplier, price & tax rate
purchases.errorFailed: Recognition failed. Please upload a clear invoice image.
purchases.alertRequired: Please fill in supplier and quantity
purchases.errorRequiredFields: Please fill in supplier and quantity
purchases.notInvoiceWarning: This file does not appear to be an invoice or receipt (detected: {{type}}). Please verify the file or fill in manually.

sales.title: Sales & Output Tax
sales.pageSubtitle: Sales business ledger — record each sale as it happens; profit & loss is based on business records.
sales.uploadTitle: Drag & drop or click to upload invoice
sales.uploadSubtitle: Supports images or PDF. AI recognition for higher accuracy.
sales.uploadAnalyzing: AI extracting date, amount, invoice number...
sales.inventoryWarning: Low inventory — sales will cause negative stock
sales.empty: No sales records. Upload an invoice or add manually.
sales.errorFailed: Recognition failed. Upload a clear invoice image.
sales.alertRequired: Please fill in customer and quantity
sales.inventoryLow: Low inventory — sales will cause negative stock
sales.formValidation: Please fill in customer and quantity
sales.recognizeFailed: Recognition failed. Upload a clear invoice image.
sales.uploadExtracting: AI extracting date, amount, invoice number...
sales.notInvoiceWarning: This file does not appear to be an invoice or receipt (detected: {{type}}). Please verify the file or fill in manually.

invoices.tableSubtitle: Reconcile invoices against purchase / sales records

analysis.multiLineNotice: With multi-product line items, the quantity charts/columns may be incomplete — rely on single-product records or the inventory detail (amount metrics are unaffected).
analysis.matrixSubtitle: Integrated clustering analysis of amount, volume & macro indices
analysis.anomalyLow: Very low per-unit revenue volatility. Pricing strategy is stable.
analysis.anomalyMid: Moderate per-unit revenue volatility. Monitor price changes.
analysis.anomalyHigh: High per-unit revenue volatility. Investigate anomalous months.
analysis.insufficientHistory: Not enough history to compute MoM / YoY

accounts.pageSubtitle: Track receivables/payables and aging by the payment status of purchases / sales.

finance.pdfDesktopOnly: PDF export is available in the desktop app only.
finance.pdfFailed: PDF export failed. Please try again.
finance.cashflowBasisNote: Management basis · cash basis · not a statutory cash-flow statement.
finance.cashflowVsPlNote: Cash flow is by actual payment date; the P&L is by transaction/accrual date, so they may differ.
finance.cashflowSubtitle: There is not enough cash flow data in this ledger yet. Add purchases, sales, or income and expense records to view cash flow analysis.
finance.cashflowDesc: This management cash flow overview will appear once you add purchases, sales, or income and expense records. It provides management estimates, not statutory financial statements — use the Management P&L for income, expenses, and tax estimates.
finance.balanceComingSoonDesc: This management balance overview will appear once you add cash accounts, assets, liabilities, or transactions. It provides management estimates, not statutory financial statements — use the Management P&L for income, expenses, and tax estimates.
finance.comingSoonBadge: Management overview · shown once data is added
finance.balanceOverviewDisclaimer: This overview is on a management basis and is not strictly balanced like a statutory statement; the "balance difference / to be adjusted" line below is a pending-adjustment item, not necessarily an error.
finance.balanceBorrowingsNullMaturity: Includes borrowings without a maturity date, shown as current for now
finance.balanceRetainedHint: Functional-currency basis · management estimate (no year-end close)
finance.balanceIncomeTaxHint: Functional currency · same-tax-same-period offset · management estimate
finance.balanceIncomeTaxLossCaveat: Accrued income tax is negative (loss-period estimate); the prepaid line does not represent an actual prepayment

aiInsights.title: AI Brief
aiInsights.error: AI analysis failed. Check network or API config and retry.
aiInsights.quotaExceeded: Gemini quota reached. Switch AI provider or try again later.
aiInsights.quotaSwitchHint: {{providers}} available — switch in Settings → AI Providers.
aiInsights.empty: No analysis data. Click refresh to generate.

aiError.noProvider: No AI provider configured. Add an API key under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.auth: The API key is invalid or expired. Check and update it under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.permission: No access to this model. You may need to enable it or get allow-listed in the provider console.
aiError.quota: Rate limit reached or quota exhausted. Retry later, or switch AI provider.
aiError.modelNotFound: The model ID does not exist or is unavailable. Set an available model ID under Settings → AI Providers.
aiError.emptyResponse: The provider returned a successful response, but the model produced no usable content. This model ID may not support this test, may not be fully enabled, or you may need a different model ID.
aiError.badRequest: Invalid request. Common causes: a misspelled model ID or an unsupported feature.
aiError.serverError: The AI provider's service is having issues. Please retry later.
aiError.parseFailed: Failed to parse the AI response. Please retry; if it persists, switch model or provider.
aiError.network: Cannot reach the AI provider. Check your network or proxy settings.
aiError.timeout: The AI request timed out. Please retry later.
aiError.unknown: The AI request failed. Please retry later.

common2.multiLineQtyHint: Multiple products — see quantities per product

ocr.errorUnsupportedFormat: Unsupported file. Please upload a JPG / PNG / WebP image or a PDF.
ocr.errorImageTooLarge: Image too large (max 8MB). Please compress it and try again.
ocr.errorPdfRender: Could not read the PDF. Make sure the file isn't corrupted and try again.
ocr.noProviderConfigured: The current AI service doesn't support OCR. Configure an OCR-capable provider (e.g. Qwen / Gemini) under Settings → AI Providers.
ocr.previewHint: Review the recognized fields, then click "Use these values" to fill the form — you still save manually.

ai.analyzeSystemPrompt:
You are a professional business analyst. Analyze the following business data and provide:
1. summary: A brief executive summary
2. topInsights: 3-5 key insights (array)
3. recommendations: 3-5 improvement suggestions (array)
4. anomalies: List of anomalous indicators (array)
Return strictly in JSON format.
ai.ocrPrompt:
You are a professional document data extraction assistant. Extract the following information from this invoice image, return strictly in JSON format (no markdown code blocks):
{
  "date": "Invoice date YYYY-MM-DD",
  "customer": "Customer / buyer name",
  "quantity": "Total quantity with unit",
  "price": total amount excluding tax (number),
  "shipping": shipping cost (number),
  "invoiceNo": "Invoice number",
  "totalWithTax": total amount including tax (number),
  "unitPriceWithoutTax": unit price excluding tax (number),
  "taxAmount": total tax amount (number)
}
Numeric fields must be numbers not strings. Use 0 if not found.
ai.chatSystemPrompt:
You are a professional business data assistant with access to all real-time business data.

Your responsibilities:
1. Answer questions about internal operations using the complete data
2. Perform cross-module analysis
3. Proactively correlate data from multiple modules for comprehensive insights

IMPORTANT: Strictly follow the accounting locale below for business and financial analysis (management basis) (currency, tax regime, report structure, accounting categories), and respond in the UI language below. Do NOT infer accounting locale from UI language, and do NOT infer UI language from accounting locale.

Formatting: Use **bold** only (not ***). Use clear lists and paragraphs.
ai.contextFallback: Business summary: annual revenue {{revenue}}, gross margin {{grossMargin}}%, net margin {{netMargin}}%.
ai.boundaryDirective: Boundary: provide only management-level estimates and suggestions; do not state statutory tax or accounting conclusions. When tax filing, returns, or compliance arise, state that figures are estimates and advise consulting a qualified accountant/tax professional.

usTax.title: US Tax Tools
usTax.notApplicable: The current accounting locale is not US. US Tax Tools is only available when accountingLocale = US. Please switch to the US accounting standard in Settings to use it.
usTax.mileageNote: IRS standard mileage rate: ${{rate}}/mile ({{year}}). Deduction auto-calculated and maps to Schedule C Line 9 (Car & Truck Expenses).
usTax.homeOfficeNote: Simplified method: max $1,500 (300 sqft × $5). Actual method requires tracking actual expenses and prorating by area. Maps to Schedule C Line 30 / Form 8829.

csvImport.dropHint: Drag a file here, or click to select
csvImport.formatHint: Supports CSV and Excel (.xlsx) files, up to 500 rows
csvImport.mappingInstruction: Confirm how CSV columns map to system fields:
csvImport.previewHeading: Preview of the first 10 rows ({{count}} total):
csvImport.excelParseError: Failed to parse Excel file. Please try CSV format.
csvImport.csvParseError: Failed to parse CSV file. Please check the file format.
csvImport.errAmountPositive: Total amount must be greater than 0
csvImport.multiLineHint: Add a "Document No." to merge rows sharing it into one document with line items; leave it blank for one row per record.
csvImport.allOrNothingNotice: If any row or document fails validation, the whole file is not imported — please fix and retry.
csvImport.errGroupConflict: Document {{docNo}}: inconsistent date / counterparty across its rows
csvImport.errGroupNoLines: Document {{docNo}} has no valid line items
csvImport.errAmountConflict: Tax-inclusive total conflicts with the unit price
csvImport.errLineNeedsProductOrDesc: A line item needs a product or a description
csvImport.errorSummary: {{count}} error(s) — the whole file will not be imported; fix them first
csvImport.unmatchedBadge: No product match — imported as description only (not counted in inventory)
csvImport.previewMoreDocs: {{count}} more documents not shown in the preview
csvImport.errProductAmbiguous: Product name "{{name}}" matches multiple products — pick one in the preview
csvImport.errDupLineNo: Document {{docNo}}: duplicate line numbers — sorted by file order

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.amountBasisNote: Total income/expense are tax-inclusive totals (as entered).
transactions.pageSubtitle: Cash-flow log — record actual income and expenses to help reconcile business and accounting changes.
transactions.empty: No transactions yet. Click "New Transaction" to add one.

products.title: Products & Services
products.subtitle: Manage products and service items and their units. Service items are excluded from inventory.
products.name: Name
products.empty: No products or services yet. Click below to add one.

documents.title: Business Documents
documents.subtitle: Create and manage quotations, sales orders and other internal business documents (not tax invoices)
documents.desktopOnly: Business documents are available in the desktop app only
documents.voidConfirm: Void this document? It can no longer be edited.
documents.loadFailed: Failed to load, please try again
documents.itemsRequired: Please add at least one line item
documents.pdfDesktopOnly: PDF export is available in the desktop app only.
documents.pdfFailed: PDF export failed. Please try again.
documents.pdfDisclaimer: This is an internal business document, not an official tax invoice.
documents.generatedOk: Business document created — see the Business Documents page
documents.stmtNoRecords: No sales records for this customer in the period
documents.stmtNeedInput: Select a customer and period first
documents.taxInvoiceNumberHint: Manually enter the externally issued invoice number; never auto-generated
documents.attachmentMissing: Attachment file not found; it may have been moved or deleted
documents.attachmentNotBackedUp: Note: attachments are not included in database backups; back up the attachments folder separately
documents.taxInvoiceCompliance: This feature only records an externally issued official tax invoice; it does not issue invoices
documents.taxInvoiceVoidReadOnly: Invoice link info is read-only for voided documents
documents.attachmentInvalidType: Only PDF / JPG / PNG files are supported

disclaimer.report: This view is a management estimate generated from your data using simplified rules. It is not a statutory financial statement — rely on a qualified accountant and official figures for tax filing and external reporting.
disclaimer.tax: Estimate for management reference only — not a basis for tax filing.
disclaimer.ai: AI conclusions are estimates from your data, may be inaccurate, and are not professional tax or accounting advice.
disclaimer.usTax: Estimates only — not for tax filing. Consult a tax professional.
disclaimer.rates: Tax rates are preset reference values and may change — verify against current official rates.

cashAccounts.title: Accounts & Opening Balances
cashAccounts.subtitle: Register cash / bank accounts and their opening balances for later management analysis.
cashAccounts.notBalanceSheetNote: This only records accounts and opening balances (management basis). It is not a balance sheet and performs no balancing.
cashAccounts.name: Account name
cashAccounts.openingHint: The opening balance is the account balance on the opening date; it is recorded only and is not reconciled with transactions.
cashAccounts.empty: No accounts yet. Click below to add one.

liabilities.title: Liabilities & Loans
liabilities.subtitle: A manual ledger of borrowings and other liabilities (bank loans, shareholder loans, equipment finance, etc.) for later management analysis.
liabilities.notBalanceSheetNote: This only records liabilities/loans (management basis). It is not a balance sheet and performs no balancing or repayment scheduling.
liabilities.notTradePayableNote: Do not record trade payables here — purchase payables are summarized automatically from your purchases.
liabilities.name: Name
liabilities.interestRateHint: The annual rate is recorded for reference only; it does not feed any interest or repayment calculation.
liabilities.openingHint: The opening outstanding balance is the amount owed on the start date; it is recorded only and not reconciled with transactions. It is usually positive, but negatives are allowed (not enforced).
liabilities.empty: No liabilities/loans yet. Click below to add one.

fixedAssets.title: Fixed Assets Register
fixedAssets.subtitle: A manual register of fixed assets (equipment, vehicles, office furniture, etc.) for later management analysis.
fixedAssets.notBalanceSheetNote: This only records fixed assets (management basis). It is not a balance sheet and performs no balancing.
fixedAssets.notDepreciationNote: This is registration only — no depreciation, no net book value, no depreciation expense.
fixedAssets.name: Asset name
fixedAssets.originalValueHint: The original value is recorded only; it does not feed depreciation or any calculation. Usually non-negative, but not enforced.
fixedAssets.empty: No fixed assets yet. Click below to add one.
fixedAssets.depreciationParamsNote: These are depreciation parameters only — no depreciation expense or net book value is generated here (net value / accumulated depreciation are estimated in the management balance overview).

equity.title: Equity & Capital Ledger
equity.subtitle: A manual ledger of equity/capital events (capital contributions, owner draws, adjustments, etc.) for later management analysis.
equity.notBalanceSheetNote: This only records equity/capital events (management basis). It is not a balance sheet and performs no balancing.
equity.notRollupNote: This is registration only — no equity totals, no retained-earnings / profit carry-forward, no chart-of-accounts mapping.
equity.name: Item name
equity.amountHint: The amount is recorded only; the app does not interpret its sign, total it, or carry it forward. Negatives are allowed.
equity.empty: No equity/capital entries yet. Click below to add one.

taxPayments.title: Tax Payments Ledger
taxPayments.subtitle: A manual ledger of taxes already paid (historical payment records) for later management analysis.
taxPayments.notBalanceSheetNote: This only records taxes paid (management basis). It is not a balance sheet and performs no balancing.
taxPayments.notComputeNote: This is registration only — no tax calculation, no deduction, no offsetting, no reconciliation with the app's tax estimates, and nothing enters reports.
taxPayments.name: Item name
taxPayments.amountHint: The amount is recorded only; it is usually the amount paid (positive). Refunds/corrections may be negative — the app does not deduct, interpret the sign, or total it.
taxPayments.empty: No tax payments yet. Click below to add one.

ledgerSummary.title: Ledger Summary Snapshot
ledgerSummary.subtitle: A per-ledger total of each ledger (accounts / liabilities / fixed assets / equity), grouped by currency — for management reference only.
ledgerSummary.snapshotNote: This is a management-basis snapshot of each ledger's totals, NOT a balance sheet: no asset/liability/equity classification, no grand totals, no balancing, no depreciation, no carry-forward, no offsetting.
ledgerSummary.mixedCurrencyNote: Currencies are listed separately — no exchange-rate conversion and no cross-currency totals.
ledgerSummary.taxMemoHeading: Tax paid (memo — separate, not included in any total above)
